info.name: Backlog Boss
info.description: API collection for Backlog Boss. Base URL: http://localhost:3000

variable.description: Default igdb_id used in game action requests. Replace with a real igdb_id from your library.

request.description: Confirms server is running, user exists, and Steam credentials are configured.

Runs all three sync phases in order: Steam library → IGDB enrichment → HLTB lookup. Will take several minutes for large libraries. Watch server console for progress. Set Postman request timeout to 0 (unlimited) in Settings.
Returns the 10 most recent sync log entries. Check status field for success/partial/failed.
Returns two arrays: games (in-progress, sorted by completion proximity) and ongoing (Always On section, no HLTB bar).
Returns unplayed and backburner games sorted alphabetically. Each game includes a status field — backburner games will have status='backburner'.
Returns completed games sorted by most recently beaten, with star rating, tags, and free text.
Returns all played games — beaten, retired, and manually logged history entries — with event_type badge (completed/retired/historical).
Games with > 10h playtime and no HLTB data — likely live service or sandbox games that should be classified as ongoing.

Mark a game as completed. starRating (1-5) is required. positiveTags options: great_story, loved_gameplay, hidden_gem, overhyped, would_replay, recommend. negativeTags options: felt_repetitive, too_difficult, lost_interest, life_got_busy, not_my_genre, other.
Mark a game as retired. No star rating required. negativeTags options: felt_repetitive, too_difficult, lost_interest, life_got_busy, not_my_genre, other.
Mark a game as ongoing (live service, sandbox, board game app — no completion state). Moves to Always On section in Now. Exit path is Mark Retired.
Push a Now game to backburner. Removes from Now, appears in Next with backburner indicator. Survives Steam sync (won't be reset to in_progress).
Move a backburner game back to in_progress. Will appear in Now view after restore.
Move a completed or retired game back to in_progress. Preserves game_events and game_interviews history — the event record is kept for the taste engine.
Log a previously played game to History. Ownership type is set to 'historical'. Star rating is optional.
Add a non-Steam game to the Now view. ownershipType must be one of: owned_ps5, owned_switch, owned_other. playtimeMinutes is optional.
Clears hltb_fetched_at for all games with no HLTB data. Run this after a throttled sync, then run /api/sync again to retry those games.
Diagnostic: runs the HLTB search key extraction logic and returns the raw result. Use if HLTB lookups are returning unexpected results.

query.description: Game title to search on HLTB

request.description: Returns both the raw HLTB API response and the mapped result. Use to verify the search key extraction is working and that times are being converted correctly.
Checks both Ollama models: inference model (qwen2.5:14b) for explanations, and embed model (nomic-embed-text) for ranking. Both must be available before running embed-games or refresh.

ONE-TIME SETUP (then incremental). Generates and stores embedding vectors for all games using nomic-embed-text. Returns immediately — poll GET /api/taste/embed-status for progress. First run: ~1-2s per game (30-40 min for 1300 games). Subsequent runs: only new games are embedded.
Returns embedding job progress: status, progress/total counts, percentComplete, elapsedSeconds. Poll until status is 'done' before running refresh.
Abort a running embed job. Safe to resume later — already-embedded games are stored and won't be re-processed.

Kicks off background taste inference: embeds taste profile → cosine similarity ranks entire library → LLM explains top 15 individually. Returns immediately. Poll GET /api/taste/status. When ready, fetch GET /api/taste/snapshot.
Force a new inference run even if context hash hasn't changed.
Returns inference job state: 'idle' | 'generating' | 'ready' | 'failed'. tokensGenerated increases while LLM is writing explanations — use as liveness signal.
Abort a running inference job.
Returns the most recent cached suggestion snapshot. Fetch this after status is 'ready'. Each suggestion includes igdb_id, title, rank, explanation, and similarity score.
Tests the per-game explanation prompt against 3 candidates. Returns profileSummary and per-game explanations. Fast (~30s). Use to iterate on explanation quality.
Shows completed/retired/in-progress counts and total eligible candidate count. No inference.
Dismiss a game from suggestions for 30 days. Re-enters candidate pool automatically after 30 days.

item.name: Raw Lookup by Steam App ID

request.description: Diagnostic: returns the full raw IGDB API response for a Steam App ID, before any mapping or transformation. Use to inspect the raw IGDB data shape.

query.description: Steam App ID to look up (400 = Portal)

request.description: Look up a single game by Steam App ID. Use this to verify IGDB credentials and query logic are working before running a full sync.
Search IGDB by game name. Used by the History view — also useful for verifying IGDB connectivity.
